mapper.sql: select id, bill_no, status, customer_id, contract_no, amount_untaxed, amount_taxed, invoice_pattern_id, pay_pattern_id, currency_id, shipment_type_id, exchange_rate, order_day, address_id, contact_id, so_type, project_id, sales_id, dept_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from ord_so
mapper.insert:
insert into ord_so
bill_no, status, customer_id, contract_no, amount_untaxed, amount_taxed, invoice_pattern_id, pay_pattern_id, currency_id, shipment_type_id, exchange_rate, order_day, address_id, contact_id, so_type, project_id, sales_id, dept_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{billNo}, #{status}, #{customerId}, #{contractNo}, #{amountUntaxed}, #{amountTaxed}, #{invoicePatternId}, #{payPatternId}, #{currencyId}, #{shipmentTypeId}, #{exchangeRate}, #{orderDay}, #{addressId}, #{contactId}, #{soType}, #{projectId}, #{salesId}, #{deptId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from ord_so where id in
#{id}
